response.original_title: Adolfo Domínguez: El eco de otras voces
response.overview: The life and career of the designer Adolfo Domínguez, and his lesser-known sides: his childhood in Trives, his time in Franco's prison, or his university years in Paris.
response.tagline: The life and career of the designer Adolfo Domínguez, and his lesser-known sides: his childhood in Trives, his time in Franco's prison, or his university years in Paris.
response.title: Adolfo Domínguez: El eco de otras voces
